channel.name: AIPowerStacks
channel.contact_source: official about page public contact email
channel.subject: Suggested AIPowerStacks listing: Ralph Workflow

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free and open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification into a reviewable repo-native flow.

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Codeberg adoption is flat, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, Reddit remains structurally blocked, and AIPowerStacks is a fresh developer-facing AI tools directory with a strong workflow/comparison audience. Its public submit surface currently requires account login, but the official about page exposes a legitimate editorial contact email, so direct curator outreach was the highest-leverage same-run write path available without creating a new external account.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: prioritize Codeberg-first distribution and proof-led positioning
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: current need is qualified traffic plus stronger free-use framing
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: reused canonical positioning truths and developer-tool framing
outreach-log.md: verified AIPowerStacks had not already been contacted
channel_discovery.json: AIPowerStacks submit page is live but login-gated from this runtime

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, published AIPowerStacks listing, comparison inclusion, or other qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched directory/curator surface instead of re-sending the same pitch.
